judgeReasoning: The response avoids routing to the Search UI (good) and does describe `/llms-full.txt` as a fallback for when page-level link-following is insufficient (good). However, it fails to identify the LLM files / `leadtype/llm` output APIs (e.g., `generateLLMFullContextFiles`, `generateLlmsTxt`, `generateAgentReadabilityArtifacts`, `generateAgentsMd`) as the agent-facing output APIs. Instead, it points to `/docs/llms.txt` and generic reference pages, missing the required identification of the LLM files reference area.
